--- title: Activity Diagram - ZKP Tooling Comparison config: theme: base --- %% UML Activity (IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream) for ZKP tooling comparison workflow. stateDiagram-v2 state "Define ZKP requirements
(IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)" as Define state "Shortlist ZKP libraries" as Shortlist state "Evaluate integration fit
(IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)" as Fit state "Run benchmarks
(IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode)" as Bench state "Select candidate for PoC" as Select state "Reject or defer candidate" as Reject state "Document decision and risks" as Document [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream] --> Define Define --> Shortlist Shortlist --> Fit: fits platform constraints Shortlist --> Reject: lacks required support Fit --> Bench Bench --> Select: meets PoC targets Bench --> Shortlist: fails targets Reject --> Shortlist Select --> Document Document --> [IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic]
repo_description: The QuantumZero repository hosts the project’s public-facing static website, delivered through Static Pages. This site provides high-level information about the platform, including architectural overv

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网场景设计一个ZKP工具选型的工作流。起点应该是TelemetryStream进来的需求，然后定义具体的ZKP要求。
明白。Define这个节点我标注成和MQTT_Broker相关，因为需求定义阶段主要关注协议层的零知识证明需求。接下来是Shortlist环节筛选候选库，对吗？
对。Shortlist之后要评估和ActuatorController的集成适配度，这个Fit节点很关键，得看平台约束能不能满足。
Fit之后我打算连到Bench，用EdgeNode的环境跑基准测试。这里有个分支：如果测试失败要回到Shortlist重新选，通过的话进入Select。
Shortlist到Reject这条线也要加上——有些库直接缺少必需支持，不用走到Fit。还有Reject之后应该能回到Shortlist继续筛别的。
已添加。Select确定PoC候选后进入Document环节，最后输出到PLC_Logic。整个流程闭环了。
Shortlist到Fit的触发条件写清楚一点——标注成"fits platform constraints"，这样和Reject那条"lacks required support"形成对比。
已调整。Bench到Select标注"meets PoC targets"，Bench回Shortlist标注"fails targets"。所有状态迁移条件都补全了。
